# Repository Safety Instruction

Deleting this Git repository is forbidden.

Never delete the local repository, its `.git` directory or history, its configured remote, or the remote GitHub repository. Never use `rm -rf` on the repository, `gh repo delete`, a GitHub repository-delete API call, destructive reinitialization, or an equivalent replacement workflow.

For cleanup or migration, preserve the repository and use dated archive folders, branches, tags, or a new checkout. If repository deletion appears necessary, stop and ask Piter. Follow [docs/repository-safety.md](../docs/repository-safety.md) and `AGENTS.md`.
